reference: Hi Doctor, I have a small cyst. The doctor told me that I have Polycystic Ovarian Disease. I have been taking Kalarchikkai with pepper and honey, making small balls for the past twenty-eight days. The first time I got my period after twenty-eight days, and the second time I got it after thirteen days. Is this normal? Can I continue the medication for forty-eight days, or should I stop? Please suggest some ideas.
text: Hi doctor, I have this. The doctor told me that I have polycystic ovarian disease. I have been taking kalar chikai with pepper and honey, making small balls for the past twenty eight days. The first time I got my period after twenty eight days, and the second time I got it after thirteen days. Is this normal? Can I continue the medication for forty eight days, or should I stop? Please suggest some ideas.
